## Cluster summary (compressed top-of-mind)

**Q2-2026 recursive-review cascade (15 memos, ~284KB)** is the operational ledger of the CLAUDE.md "Recursive adversarial review protocol — non-negotiable" 3-clean-pass discipline applied across two distinct waves. **Wave 1 (R1-R13, 2026-05-13)** was a deep recursive sweep over the post-WAVE-9-CLOSURE codebase: `feedback_recursive_review_r1_LANDED_20260513.md` opened with 1 CRITICAL + 5 Medium + 4 CLEAN; each subsequent round (R2-R13) re-ran the 10-surface adversarial sweep with rotated council perspectives. R2 surfaced 3 Medium findings (10-surface sweep); R3 found 4 Medium + Low; R5/R6/R7/R8/R9/R10 each closed prior findings while uncovering new bug classes; R11 found the META-class scope-expansion (`feedback_recursive_review_r11_LANDED_20260513.md` 25KB) that led to Catalog #188 META-meta scope expansion; R12 (`_r12_extreme_adversarial_LANDED_20260513.md` 28KB) hit the structural-unsatisfiability boundary (lens-coverage expansion outpacing Zipf-decay) that motivated the R12-D meta-finding + D-1 conservative SEAL alternative; R13 (`_r13_deepest_adversarial_LANDED_20260513.md` 34KB) was the final deepest-adversarial pass that ratified the SEAL.

**Wave 2 (R1-R2 wave_a, 2026-05-14)** was a scoped re-review of 5 council-PROCEED commits (`feedback_recursive_review_r1_wave_a_landed_20260514.md` + `_r2_wave_a_landed_20260514.md`) that found and closed 12 R1 findings plus reset the clean-pass counter to 0/3 after R2 surfaced 6 new findings (CARGO-CULTED-EMPIRICALLY-FALSIFIED Assumption-Adversary verdicts driving the FIX-WAVE-R1 follow-on that became `feedback_fix_wave_r1_wave_a_landed_20260514.md`). The `feedback_recursive_review_cascade_pattern_20260506.md` (3KB) documents the canonical cascade pattern itself — round-N CLEAN does not auto-promote until 3 consecutive clean rounds; ANY finding resets counter to 0; per-round axes are explicitly rotated to avoid blind spots.

**Cross-cutting outputs:** the recursive-review cascade is the empirical receipt for CLAUDE.md "Recursive adversarial review protocol — close paths" (counter-advance SEAL + operator-declared D-1 SEAL alternatives) and the source of the "assumption-challenge axis" item 8 in the protocol (the structural blindness this cluster exposed motivated Catalog #291 + #292 META-ASSUMPTION ADVERSARIAL REVIEW non-negotiable + Assumption-Adversary sextet-pact seat). Operators should read CLAUDE.md "Recursive adversarial review protocol" + the FIX-WAVE cluster (sister `MEMORY_CLUSTER_feedback_fix_wave_2026Q2.md`) for the closure side of each recursive-review finding.
